title: Add info button shell
overview: Create a minimal info button in the bottom-right corner that toggles an overlay panel. The overlay is a shell (placeholder content) that opens/closes without page reload, works on desktop and mobile.

steps.description: Implement two exported functions: createInfoButton() which returns an HTMLButtonElement (ⓘ icon, fixed bottom-right, minimal styling), and createInfoOverlay() which returns an HTMLDivElement (full-viewport semi-transparent overlay with placeholder text and a close button). Wire button click to show overlay, close button and overlay background click to hide overlay. Escape key also closes. All DOM creation is programmatic — no innerHTML with user data.
steps.test_focus: Button renders, overlay toggles visibility, Escape closes, click-outside closes, no reload on close

steps.action: Add overlay and button styles to src/style.css
steps.description: Add styles for .eavi-info-btn (fixed, bottom-right, translucent, pointer cursor, z-index above canvas) and .eavi-info-overlay (fixed, full viewport, semi-transparent dark backdrop, centered content panel, z-index above button). Include touch-friendly sizing (min 44x44 tap target). Add reduced-motion media query to skip any transitions.
steps.test_focus: Visual regression: button visible, overlay covers viewport, mobile tap target size

steps.description: Import createInfoButton and createInfoOverlay from src/ui/infoOverlay.ts. Append both elements to the #app container after scene init. This keeps UI layered above the canvas.
steps.test_focus: Button and overlay present in DOM after app init

steps.description: Unit tests using vitest + jsdom: (1) createInfoButton returns a button element, (2) createInfoOverlay returns a hidden div, (3) clicking button shows overlay, (4) clicking close hides overlay, (5) pressing Escape hides overlay, (6) overlay closes without triggering navigation or reload.
Run vite build to confirm no TS errors. Run vitest to confirm all tests pass. Manual check: no console errors, no forbidden storage APIs, overlay works with and without autoplay context.
steps.test_focus: Clean build, green tests, no console errors

acceptance_verification.info_button_visible: Step 1+2: button appended to DOM with fixed positioning and sufficient z-index
acceptance_verification.button_opens_overlay: Step 1: click handler toggles overlay visibility from hidden to visible
acceptance_verification.overlay_closes_without_reload: Step 1: close via close-button click, backdrop click, or Escape key — all use style.display toggle, no navigation
acceptance_verification.desktop_and_mobile: Step 2: 44px min tap target, pointer and touch events, responsive overlay sizing

risks: Overlay must not interfere with pointer entropy capture on the canvas — use stopPropagation only on overlay clicks, not globally
z-index layering must keep button above canvas but below any future modals
